steps.title: Interpret the function form
steps.content: The model $f(x) = 33 - 0.18x$ is linear in $x$, the number of days after the start. The constant term $33$ is the $y$-intercept, the value when $x = 0$.

steps.title: Evaluate at the start of the project
steps.content:
At $x = 0$ days: $f(0) = 33 - 0.18(0) = 33$ cm.

So $33$ is the estimated height of the liquid at the start of the project. The other constant, $-0.18$, is the per-day rate of change (a separate quantity).

steps.title: Check each choice
steps.content:
• A. Height at the start: matches $f(0) = 33$.
  • B. Height at the end: the problem gives no end date, and the height changes over time, so $33$ doesn't represent an ending height.
  • C. Daily change in height: that's $-0.18$ cm/day, not $33$.
  • D. Days for the liquid to fully evaporate: solving $33 - 0.18x = 0$ gives $x \approx 183$ days, not $33$.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
